channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Kylie Kelce unseats Joe Rogan as top podcast with debut episode
item.description: Kylie Kelce, wife of former NFL player turned media personality Jason Kelce, beat out Joe Rogan for the top podcast spot on both Apple and Spotify this week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Cybersecurity Concerns: Researchers Uncover Vulnerabilities Exposing Sensitive Information
item.description: Researchers discover vulnerabilities in public sites exposing sensitive information, sold on dark web for hundreds of euros. Misconfigured cloud instances used to steal data from millions of websites.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: OpenAI releases video creation tool
item.description: ChatGPT producer OpenAI rolled out a video creation tool this week that lets paying customers create short-length video clips through text prompts. OpenAI introduced Sora, a video generation model, on Monday. It can generate realistic videos in a resolution up to 1080p and up to 20 seconds long.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: HPE execs reveal why they cancelled $700M AI server deal
item.description: There was one particular juicy tidbit during Hewlett Packard Enterprise’s (HPE’s) fourth quarter earnings call with financial analysts last week.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to build better AI chatbots
item.description: At Campfire, we launched a consumer AI chat product called Cozy Friends on Steam and mobile on October 12. Imagine Animal Crossing or The Sims with AI agents. In the first 30 days, users exchanged more than 1.7M messages with our AI agents.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Microsoft’s Copilot Vision assistant can now browse the web with you
item.description: Microsoft’s Copilot Vision feature is now available for users to test in a limited preview. Built natively into Microsoft’s Edge browser, Copilot Vision analyzes and understands the contents of web pages you visit.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: EV batteries may last much longer than expected: Study
item.description: The shelf-life of electric vehicle (EV) batteries may be as much as 40 percent greater than previously assumed, a new study has found.
item.dc:creator: Sharon Udasin, The Hill

item.title: Supply chain compromise of Ultralytics AI library results in trojanized versions
item.description: Attackers have compromised Ultralytics YOLO packages published on PyPI, the official Python package index, by compromising the build environment of the popular library for creating custom machine learning models.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: San Jose pushes AI to provide better government to constituents
item.description: The collaboration between members of the GovAI coalition is spurring the adoption of new technologies and AI-solutions by government agencies.
item.dc:creator: Devan Patel, The Mercury News

item.title: US approves export of AI chips to UAE amid Microsoft-G42 partnership
item.description: The US government has approved the export of advanced AI chips to a Microsoft-run facility in the United Arab Emirates (UAE), marking a significant step in the tech giant’s partnership with Emirati AI firm G42.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Consumer watchdog faces daunting future under Trump
item.description: The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) is headed for a rocky future under President-elect Trump. The powerful financial watchdog agency is in for a reckoning during a second Trump administration, which will likely take steps to curb its power and regulatory agenda.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: ACLU spurns 'flawed and dangerous' ruling on TikTok ban
item.description: The American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU) condemned Friday’s “flawed and dangerous” federal appeals court ruling that upheld the law banning the social media platform TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Struggling to hear TV dialogue? Try these simple fixes
item.description: If it sounds like actors on your TV are speaking in whispers, there's a way to fix it to make your TV audio sound better. The CyberGuy has several tips.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO murder: How Silicon Valley protects its CEOs
item.description: Trying to keep tech leaders safe in a country awash with guns, and in an industry that can generate volatile emotions, does not come cheaply.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Killing of UnitedHealthcare CEO uncorks anger at insurance industry
item.description: The killing of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson on a Manhattan street is the latest moment to shine a light on the tensions roiling American life.
item.dc:creator: Niall Stanage, NewsNation

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Clarifai previews AI compute orchestration
item.description: AI platform provider Clarifai is publicly previewing compute orchestration for AI workloads that the company says works across any AI model on any compute, at any scale.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI glasses to help dementia patients aims to launch next year
item.description: “It’s continuously watching your visual environment and giving you assistance,” CareYaya CEO Neal Shah said.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Prann, NewsNation

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Cisco strengthens AWS integration to speed troubleshooting in multicloud environments
item.description: Cisco this week said it has bolstered integrations between its own hybrid cloud offerings and Amazon Web Services (AWS) to improve visibility and help enterprise customers more accurately troubleshoot application availability issues across multicloud networks.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: This GSA official takes on the dark underside of Artificial Intelligence
item.description: "We need AI tools in place to help us plan around climate events, to help us plan around looking at ways in which we can accommodate," said Dan Pomeroy. The post This GSA official takes on the dark underside of Artificial Intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network
